subject: docs: trigger-sweep fixes — strip narrative timestamps, correct repo-tor DOWNLOAD_PDF, expand HMR bullet
body:
Ran 6 parallel trigger passes (hacks, undone, patterns, doc-cleanup,
docs, risk+cold, patterns+comments) against the branch diff. Most
clean. Applying the real findings:

A. docs/TODO.md: strip "(verified missing 2026-04-22 — earlier agent
   claim was wrong)" from model-pear preamble. Forensic context
   belongs in git log, not in the doc post-merge. (hacks finding #1)

B. docs/TODO.md: strip "(corrected 2026-04-22)" from synctone bonus
   finding header. Same reasoning. (hacks finding #2)

C. docs/TODO.md: strip "(on this branch)" from TIMER_LEAKS upstreamed
   note; change "Once this branch merges to main" to "Once merged to
   main". Branch-scoped phrasing rots after merge. (hacks finding #3)

D. docs/TODO.md line 28: fix stale repo-tor preamble claim. Previous
   text said "New small gap: DOWNLOAD_PDF partial (missing .no-print
   class + dedicated print button)" which contradicted the Gap Matrix
   (Pass) and the per-repo section (FULLY RESOLVED). Rewrote to
   reflect the actual state: DOWNLOAD_PDF complete via
   Header.jsx:187 'Save as PDF' button + print:hidden Tailwind
   variant (documented design choice, intentionally no .no-print
   class). (docs trigger WARNING)

E. docs/TODO.md Cross-Cutting Gap #16: removed repo-tor from the
   "DOWNLOAD_PDF gap" list and added it to the Pass list alongside
   canva-grid, budgy-ting, sun-sea-o. Same correction as D.
   (docs trigger WARNING, related)

F. CLAUDE.md § Timer and Subscription Cleanup: expand HMR bullet
   to also mention `import.meta.hot.dispose()` for frameworks that
   expose it. The pattern doc covers this but the CLAUDE.md summary
   was incomplete. (cold trigger nit)

Skipped:
- TIMER_LEAKS.md Key Lesson #7 wording rewording (cold nit): the
  existing wording is already clear about "avoid when better
  primitives exist"; the suggested rewrite doesn't meaningfully
  improve precision.
- see-veo DebugBanner "Add PWA Diagnostics tab" phrasing (cold nit):
  current text is sufficient; the agent wanted "(using existing
  diagnostics.ts infrastructure)" which is implied.
- CLAUDE.md AI Notes about TutorialModal.jsx and sharp (cold nit +
  warning): pre-existing, not introduced by this branch. Out of
  scope. Worth a separate cleanup pass.
- Synctone downstream precedence (risk MEDIUM): synctone's local
  `### Timer and Subscription Cleanup` section will become redundant
  once this merges, but that's tracked in synctone's CLAUDE.md
  alignment chunk in docs/TODO.md. Not a blocker for this PR.

Tags: documentation, todo, audit, correction, cross-fleet
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-fleet-alignment
Semver: patch
